failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate matter or crystallization in BPR
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter upstream of BPR

failure_modes.cause: Increased viscosity due to solvent degradation
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly monitor solvent condition and replace as necessary

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with particulate-laden solvent to assess blockage risk
Conduct viscosity measurements of solvent at operating temperature over time
